name: Fat Free Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Mixture No. 2
1/4 cup WONDERSLIM (or prune puree)
2 tablespoons Light Corn Syrup
2 tablespoons Vanilla Extract
3/4 cup Brown Sugar (well packed)
1/4 cup White Sugar
PLUS 1 1 1/4 cups rolled oats, quick OR old fashioned, TOASTED in oven until
they barely start to turn golden.
A) Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
B) Soak 1 cup raisins in water for 10 minutes.
C) Toast 1 1 1/4 cup uncooked Oats (quick or old-fashioned), set aside.
D) Remove raisins from water, drain and set aside.
E) Spray two cookie sheets with a thin film of vegetable oil.
F) Beat Mixture No. 2 into Mixture No. 1. Fold in toasted oats, then add raisins.
Drop by spoonful onto cookie sheets. Bake for approximately 9 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Note: Turn off the oven when cookies are done baking and let them cool on the wire racks.
